steps.title: Identify the key relationship
steps.content: The passage presents two examples in sequence: an older farm (1998) with lower output (0.6 MW), then a newer farm (2021) with higher output (10 MW). This demonstrates the opening claim that newer turbines outperform older models.

steps.title: Apply the signal
steps.content: In contrast explicitly marks this performance difference between the two farms, signaling their key distinction in support of the opening claim. The other three choices don't establish this relationship: Granted concedes without comparing, For this reason invokes false causation, and Eventually indicates only time passage. That matches choice C — C is correct.
